untranslatable_reason: Signal requires put-call ratio data from full-service broker customer orders, which is not available in the standard OHLCV indicator set. The source uses proprietary broker data (put-call volume ratio by investor class) that cannot be reconstructed from price/volume indicators alone. Additionally, 'minimum 10 contracts' requires options contract volume data not present in allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Original signal is based on options market microstructure (put-call ratios segmented by broker type and customer class). This requires: (1) options volume data by strike/expiration, (2) customer classification by broker type, (3) contract-level volume tracking. Standard equity price/volume indicators cannot replicate this analysis. The expected 'next-day risk-adjusted returns' suggests a 1-day holding period, but without the core put-call ratio metric, entry conditions cannot be properly translated.
